parameters.description: states, multiple, no parameter means all
parameters.name: States

children.description: target name, multi seperated by comma
children.name: target

children.description: target name, multi seperated by comma
children.name: target

children.description: The display name for ModuleEnum, possible values include: Group, Symbol
children.name: module

children.description: The display name for server type, possible values include: MT4, MT5
children.name: serverType

parameters.description: A comma separated list of groups, accounts or tickets. You can use "*" mask (any value) and "!" negation symbol while specifying the groups. For example: "demo*,!demoforex" - all groups whose names begin with 'demo', except for the group demoforex.
parameters.name: searchString

parameters.description: The flag of requesting only open orders. When set to 0, all orders are requested; when set to a non-zero value, only open orders are requested.
parameters.name: openOnly

children.description: The login of the client, to whom the order belongs.
children.name: login

children.description: The name of a financial instrument of the order. The maximum length (including the end of line character) is 12 characters.
children.name: symbol

children.description: The number of decimal places in the price of a financial instrument.
children.name: digits

children.description: Type of a trade command. Specified by a value from the Types of trade commands enumeration., 0=Buy 1=Sell 2=BuyLimit 3=SellLimit 4=BuyStop 5=SellStop 6=Balance 7=Credit
children.name: cmd

children.description: Order close time. For balance operations, the time of the operation (open_time) is copied to this field.
children.name: closeTime

children.description: Order state. Specified by a value from the Order status enumeration., 0=OpenNormal 1=OpenRemand 2=OpenRestored 3=ClosedNormal 4=ClosedPart 5=ClosedBy 6=Deleted
children.name: state

children.description: The price level of the order Stop Loss.
children.name: sl

children.description: The price level of the order Take Profit.
children.name: tp

children.description: Reason for placing the order. Specified by a value from the Order placing reasons enumeration., 0=Client 1=Expert 2=Dealer 3=Signal 4=Gateway 5=Mobile 6=Web 7=API
children.name: reason

children.description: Amount of the agent commission of the order.
children.name: commissionAgent

children.description: Order swap in the client's deposit (an accumulated value for the entire order lifetime).
children.name: storage

children.description: Profit from a trade transaction in the client's deposit currency.
children.name: profit

children.description: The amount of tax on the commission in the client's deposit currency. Specified in the base currency per one lot. Additionally charged from the client account with the commission.
children.name: taxes

children.description: The order ID (magic number) set by the client's Expert Advisor.
children.name: magic

children.description: Comment to an order. The maximum length (including the end of line character) is 32 characters.
children.name: comment

children.description: The order ticket number on the external MetaTrader 4 server when using a gateway.
children.name: gwOrder

children.description: The difference between the order open price in the external system and the order open price on the local trade server.Specified in pips.The total open price on the gateway is obtained by adding the difference to the order open price on the local server.
children.name: gwOpenPrice

children.description: The difference between the order close price in the external system and the order close price on the local trade server. Specified in pips. The total close price on the gateway is obtained by adding the difference to the order close price on the local server.
children.name: gwClosePrice

children.description: Order margin currency to deposit currency conversion factor. Added by the server at the moment of position opening (resulting from market order placing or pending order triggering).
children.name: marginRate

children.description: Used for internal purposes. If timestamp of a record has changed, it means that the record has changed.
children.name: timestamp

/api/v2/mt4/groups.summary:
Paginated / filtered retrieval of MT4 group list.
GET /api/mt4/groups?mt4ServerName=XXX

parameters.description: MT4 server name (required, limits query scope).
parameters.name: mt4ServerName

/api/v2/mt4/groups/{groupName}.summary:
Get detailed information for a specific group.
GET /api/mt4/groups/{groupName}?mt4ServerName=XXX

children.description: Enable (mapped note says 'Enable → Name') - internal: Group name (unique within server).
children.name: name

children.description: Name (mapped line 'Name → OtpMode') - One-time password (OTP / 2FA) mode (Disabled / TOTP SHA-256).
children.name: otpMode

children.description: One-time password (mapped 'One-time password → Enable') - Enable flag (true = enabled).
children.name: enable

children.description: Force one-time password usage (mapped 'Force one-time password usage → Company') - Owning company.
children.name: company

children.description: Force one-time password usage flag (internal only, no explicit mapping line) - indicates OTP must be used.
children.name: allowFlagForcedOtpUsage

children.description: Owner / Support page (mapped 'Owner → SupportPage') - Help / support URL.
children.name: supportPage

children.description: Leverage by default (mapped 'Leverage by default → DefaultLeverage') - Default leverage applied on account creation.
children.name: defaultLeverage

children.description: Deposit by default (mapped 'Deposit by default → DefaultDeposit') - Default setial deposit (demo).
children.name: defaultDeposit

children.description: Deposit currency (mapped 'Deposit currency → Currency') - Base currency code (e.g. USD).
children.name: currency

children.description: Annual interest rate (mapped 'Annual interest rate → InterestRate') - Percentage value (e.g. 2.5 = 2.5%).
children.name: interestRate

children.description: Timeout (mapped 'Timeout → Timeout') - Inactivity period / session timeout (seconds).
children.name: timeout
newsLanguages
children.description: News languages (mapped 'News languages → NewsLanguages') - Enabled language IDs.
Maximum orders (mapped 'Maximum orders → MaxPositions') - Max open positions.
children.name: maxPositions

children.description: Maximum symbols (mapped 'Maximum symbols → MaxSecurities') - Max tradable symbols.
children.name: maxSecurities

children.description: Trade Signals (mapped 'Trade Signals → Signal/Rights') - Trading signal mode / flag.
children.name: signal

children.description: Enable internal mail system (mapped 'Enable internal mail system → Email/Rights') - Internal email feature.
children.name: email

children.description: Check request prices in IE (mapped) - Validate incoming request prices.
children.name: checkIePrices

children.description: Enable charge of swaps (mapped) - Apply swap charges.
children.name: useSwap

children.description: Prohibit hedge positions (mapped) - Disallow hedged positions.
children.name: hedgeProhibited

children.description: Enable trailing stops (mapped 'Enable trailing stops → Trailling/Rights').
children.name: trailling

children.description: Position closing according to FIFO Rule (mapped) - Enforce FIFO close.
children.name: closeFifo

children.description: Enable trading by Expert Advisors (mapped 'Enable trading by Expert Advisors → Advisor/Rights').
children.name: advisor

children.description: Use partial close with full close of setial position (mapped 'Use partial close... → CloseReopen').
children.name: closeReopen

children.description: Enable expiration of pending orders (mapped 'Enable expiration... → Expiration/Rights').
children.name: expiration

children.description: Show the risk warning window after connection (mapped 'Show the risk warning... → RiskWarning/Rights').
children.name: riskWarning

children.description: Inactivity period / Archive period (mapped 'Inactivity period → ArchivePeriod') - Archival time span.
children.name: archivePeriod

children.description: Maximum balance (mapped 'Maximum balance → ArchiveMaxBalance') - Upper balance threshold for archive rules.
children.name: archiveMaxBalance

children.description: Archive deleted pendings older (mapped 'Archive deleted pendings older → ArchivePendingPeriod').
children.name: archivePendingPeriod

children.description: Virtual credit (mapped 'Virtual credit → Credit') - Credit amount.
children.name: credit

children.description: Margin Call level (mapped) - Margin call threshold (%).
children.name: marginCall

children.description: Free Margin mode (mapped 'Free Margin → MarginMode') - Margin calculation mode., 0=DontUse 1=UseAll 2=UseProfit 3=UseLoss
children.name: marginMode

children.description: Stop Out level (mapped) - Stop out threshold (%).
children.name: marginStopout

children.description: Skip fully hedged accounts when checking for stop out (mapped).
children.name: stopOutSkipHedged

children.description: Calculate hedged margin using larger leg (mapped) - Hedge margin strategy.
children.name: hedgeLargeLeg

children.description: in (mapped 'in → MarginType') - Margin controlling type (Percent / Currency)., 0=Percent 1=Currency
children.name: marginType

children.description: (List item) Security name – from SecGroups mapping.
children.name: secName

children.description: Do not check free margin after dealer's answer (mapped 'Do not check free margin after dealer's answer → FreeMarginMode').
children.name: freeMarginMode

children.description: Maximum deviation (mapped 'Maximum deviation → IeDeviation') - Allowed price deviation.
children.name: ieDeviation

children.description: Fast confirmation on IE with deviation specified
children.name: ieQuickMode

children.description: Multiple Close by orders (mapped 'Multiple Close by orders → CloseBy/TradeRights') - Allow multi close-by.
children.name: closeBy

children.description: (Mapped 'Enable → TradeRights' second usage) - Additional close-by multi usage.
children.name: muCloseBy

children.description: (No explicit label in mapping) Commission type., 0=Money 1=Pips 2=Percent
children.name: commType

children.description: Long position swap (mapped 'Long position swap → SwapLong') - Swap (long).
children.name: swapLong

children.description: Short position swap (mapped 'Short position swap → SwapShort') - Swap (short).
children.name: swapShort

children.description: Margin percentage (mapped 'Margin percentage → MarginDivider') - Margin divider / percentage.
children.name: marginDivider

children.description: Enable (mapped 'Enable → Reports') - Enable reports system (mode or flag).
children.name: reports

children.description: SMTP password (mapped 'SMTP password → SmtpLogin') (mapping lines show swap).
children.name: smtpLogin

children.description: SMTP login (mapped 'SMTP login → SmtpPassword') (mapping lines show swap).
children.name: smtpPassword

children.description: Copy report to support (mapped 'Copy report to support → Copies').
children.name: copies

/api/v2/mt4/groups/groupcompanies.summary: get all companies from existing groups

/api/v2/mt4/groups/duplicate.summary:
Duplicate one existing group into multiple new groups under the same server.
POST /api/mt4/groups/duplicate

/api/v2/mt4/groups/transfer.summary:
Transfer (copy) groups from one source server to multiple target servers (create if not exists on targets).
POST /api/mt4/groups/transfer

/api/v2/mt4/groups/export.summary:
Export group data as Excel (.xlsx).
POST /api/v2.0/mt4/groups/export

children.description: Enable (mapped note says 'Enable → Name') - internal: Group name (unique within server).
children.name: name

children.description: Name (mapped line 'Name → OtpMode') - One-time password (OTP / 2FA) mode (Disabled / TOTP SHA-256).
children.name: otpMode

children.description: One-time password (mapped 'One-time password → Enable') - Enable flag (true = enabled).
children.name: enable

children.description: Force one-time password usage (mapped 'Force one-time password usage → Company') - Owning company.
children.name: company

children.description: Force one-time password usage flag (internal only, no explicit mapping line) - indicates OTP must be used.
children.name: allowFlagForcedOtpUsage

children.description: Owner / Support page (mapped 'Owner → SupportPage') - Help / support URL.
children.name: supportPage

children.description: Leverage by default (mapped 'Leverage by default → DefaultLeverage') - Default leverage applied on account creation.
children.name: defaultLeverage

children.description: Deposit by default (mapped 'Deposit by default → DefaultDeposit') - Default setial deposit (demo).
children.name: defaultDeposit

children.description: Deposit currency (mapped 'Deposit currency → Currency') - Base currency code (e.g. USD).
children.name: currency

children.description: Annual interest rate (mapped 'Annual interest rate → InterestRate') - Percentage value (e.g. 2.5 = 2.5%).
children.name: interestRate

children.description: Timeout (mapped 'Timeout → Timeout') - Inactivity period / session timeout (seconds).
children.name: timeout
newsLanguages
children.description: News languages (mapped 'News languages → NewsLanguages') - Enabled language IDs.
Maximum orders (mapped 'Maximum orders → MaxPositions') - Max open positions.
children.name: maxPositions

children.description: Maximum symbols (mapped 'Maximum symbols → MaxSecurities') - Max tradable symbols.
children.name: maxSecurities

children.description: Trade Signals (mapped 'Trade Signals → Signal/Rights') - Trading signal mode / flag.
children.name: signal

children.description: Enable internal mail system (mapped 'Enable internal mail system → Email/Rights') - Internal email feature.
children.name: email

children.description: Check request prices in IE (mapped) - Validate incoming request prices.
children.name: checkIePrices

children.description: Enable charge of swaps (mapped) - Apply swap charges.
children.name: useSwap

children.description: Prohibit hedge positions (mapped) - Disallow hedged positions.
children.name: hedgeProhibited

children.description: Enable trailing stops (mapped 'Enable trailing stops → Trailling/Rights').
children.name: trailling

children.description: Position closing according to FIFO Rule (mapped) - Enforce FIFO close.
children.name: closeFifo

children.description: Enable trading by Expert Advisors (mapped 'Enable trading by Expert Advisors → Advisor/Rights').
children.name: advisor

children.description: Use partial close with full close of setial position (mapped 'Use partial close... → CloseReopen').
children.name: closeReopen

children.description: Enable expiration of pending orders (mapped 'Enable expiration... → Expiration/Rights').
children.name: expiration

children.description: Show the risk warning window after connection (mapped 'Show the risk warning... → RiskWarning/Rights').
children.name: riskWarning

children.description: Inactivity period / Archive period (mapped 'Inactivity period → ArchivePeriod') - Archival time span.
children.name: archivePeriod

children.description: Maximum balance (mapped 'Maximum balance → ArchiveMaxBalance') - Upper balance threshold for archive rules.
children.name: archiveMaxBalance

children.description: Archive deleted pendings older (mapped 'Archive deleted pendings older → ArchivePendingPeriod').
children.name: archivePendingPeriod

children.description: Virtual credit (mapped 'Virtual credit → Credit') - Credit amount.
children.name: credit

children.description: Margin Call level (mapped) - Margin call threshold (%).
children.name: marginCall

children.description: Free Margin mode (mapped 'Free Margin → MarginMode') - Margin calculation mode., 0=DontUse 1=UseAll 2=UseProfit 3=UseLoss
children.name: marginMode

children.description: Stop Out level (mapped) - Stop out threshold (%).
children.name: marginStopout

children.description: Skip fully hedged accounts when checking for stop out (mapped).
children.name: stopOutSkipHedged

children.description: Calculate hedged margin using larger leg (mapped) - Hedge margin strategy.
children.name: hedgeLargeLeg

children.description: in (mapped 'in → MarginType') - Margin controlling type (Percent / Currency)., 0=Percent 1=Currency
children.name: marginType

children.description: (List item) Security name – from SecGroups mapping.
children.name: secName

children.description: Do not check free margin after dealer's answer (mapped 'Do not check free margin after dealer's answer → FreeMarginMode').
children.name: freeMarginMode

children.description: Maximum deviation (mapped 'Maximum deviation → IeDeviation') - Allowed price deviation.
children.name: ieDeviation

children.description: Fast confirmation on IE with deviation specified
children.name: ieQuickMode

children.description: Multiple Close by orders (mapped 'Multiple Close by orders → CloseBy/TradeRights') - Allow multi close-by.
children.name: closeBy

children.description: (Mapped 'Enable → TradeRights' second usage) - Additional close-by multi usage.
children.name: muCloseBy

children.description: (No explicit label in mapping) Commission type., 0=Money 1=Pips 2=Percent
children.name: commType

children.description: Long position swap (mapped 'Long position swap → SwapLong') - Swap (long).
children.name: swapLong

children.description: Short position swap (mapped 'Short position swap → SwapShort') - Swap (short).
children.name: swapShort

children.description: Margin percentage (mapped 'Margin percentage → MarginDivider') - Margin divider / percentage.
children.name: marginDivider

children.description: Enable (mapped 'Enable → Reports') - Enable reports system (mode or flag).
children.name: reports

children.description: SMTP password (mapped 'SMTP password → SmtpLogin') (mapping lines show swap).
children.name: smtpLogin

children.description: SMTP login (mapped 'SMTP login → SmtpPassword') (mapping lines show swap).
children.name: smtpPassword

children.description: Copy report to support (mapped 'Copy report to support → Copies').
children.name: copies
